system.docHtml: An oiled-leather satchel holding a cook's essentials: iron pans and pots, wooden spoons and whisks, a long knife for dressing game, a grater, a ladle, and a stirrup-pot hanger. Campaign cooks, hearth-tenders, and traveling merchants assemble such kits for field meals or roadside suppers. A well-kept kit speaks to pride in the craft; the seasoning baked into an iron pan improves with every meal prepared in it.
